---
title: "Causal ML 閱讀筆記"
subtitle: "Chernozhukov et al. Causal Machine Learning 逐章筆記"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  fields: [title, date, description, categories]
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

Chernozhukov, Hansen, Kallus, Spindler, Syrgkanis (2024)
*Causal Machine Learning* 的閱讀筆記。

涵蓋 Trees、Random Forests、Boosting、Neural Networks、Learning Guarantees 等章節。
